For export. Correct Answer is. stated on the certificate. Explanation. VAR Part 4, 4.035(b).

question: The period of validity of a Special flight permit is.

options.text: stated on the Special flight permit.
until the end of the days flying.
No limit.
One flight only. Correct Answer is. stated on the permit to fly. Explanation. VAR Part 4, 4.023(a)(1).

question: A Special flight permit is valid.

options.text: for 12 months.
until the date stated on it.
only for evaluating a modification.
For 06 months Correct Answer is. until the date stated on it. Explanation. VAR Part 4, 4.023(a)(1).

question: Certificate of Airworthiness for Vietnamese aircraft are.

options.text: necessary for all aircraft.
required by VAR Part 5.
required by VAR Part 10.
required by VAR Part 21. Correct Answer is. required by VAR Part 10. Explanation. VAR Part 10, 10.017.

question: The period of validity of an C of A is.

options.text: 24 months .
36 months.
indefinite.
not exceeding 12 months from its issuing date. Correct Answer is. not exceeding 12 months from its issuing date. Explanation. VAR Part 20, 20.055(b).

question: The Export Certificate of Airworthiness for a aircraft is issued by CAAV:

options.text: before the registration as Vietnamese nationality of the aircraft is de-registed.
after The registration as Vietnamese nationality of the aircraft is de-registed.
at the same time the registration as Vietnamese nationality of the aircraft is de-registered.

after the aircraft is registered of another Contracting State. Correct Answer is. after the registration as Vietnamese nationality of the aircraft is de-registered. Explanation. VAR Part 20, 20.060(b).

question: Certificate of temporary registration of aircraft nationality is valid for:

options.text: when aircraft is sold abroad.
not more than 12 months and may be renewed once not more than 12 months.
6 months.
The same as for C of A. Correct Answer is. not more than 12 months and may be renewed once not more than 12 months. Explanation. VAR Part 2.015(g).

question: A Noise certificate is valid for.

options.text: unlimited duration.
until a change the C of R.
until a change in ownership of the aircraft.
12 months Correct Answer is. until a change the C of R. Explanation. VAR Part 21, 21.217.

question: Categories with respect to the C of A are.

options.text: Transport, Aerial Work, Passenger and Special.
Standard, Special and Export C of A.
Transport (Passenger) and Passenger (Cargo).
Maintenance, Manufacture. Correct Answer is. Standard, Special and Export C of A. . Explanation. VAR Part 4, 4.015.

question: An aircraft Noise Certificate must be renewed.

options.text: every three years.
every five years.
only on change of aircraft ownership.
The same as for C of A. Correct Answer is. only on change of aircraft ownership. Explanation. VAR Part 21, 21.223.

question: Who shall be responsible for performing the aircraft maintenance review?

options.text: The AMO.
The operator.
CAAV.
The ATO. Correct Answer is. The Operator. Explanation. VAR Part 20, 20.103(a).

question: A Noise Certificate is a requirement of.

options.text: VAR Part 10.
VAR Part 4.
VAR Part
VAR Part 21. Correct Answer is. VAR Part 10. Explanation. VAR Part 10, 10.030.

question: A Flight Manual is.

options.text: part of the Certificate of Registration.
part of the Certificate of Airworthiness.
for information of the crew only.
must be carried on all public transport aircraft. Correct Answer is. part of the Certificate of Airworthiness. Explanation. VAR Part 10, 10.025.

question: What is the period of validity of a ferry flight permit?

options.text: valid only once.
1 Year.
3 Years.
2 Years. Correct Answer is. valid only once and is not valid for any flight of commercial purpose. Explanation. VAR Part 20, 20.070(b).

question: How many copies of the Certificate of Registration are required?

options.text: two copies, one for the flight manual, one for the filing system.
two copies, one for the owner, one for the aircraft.
one copy for the owner/operator.
Three copies, one for the flight manual, one for the owner, one for the aircraft. Correct Answer is. one copy for the owner/operator. Explanation. VAR Part 2.015(g).

question: When a major defect occurs during an aircraft's Certificate of Airworthiness period of validity.

options.text: the C of A immediately becomes invalid.
the C of A is suspended until the defect is rectified.
the C of A is not affected.
the C of A and the C of R immediately becomes invalid. Correct Answer is. the C of A immediately becomes invalid. Explanation. NIL.

question: The certificate of registration becomes invalid if.

options.text: the AOC is termed invalid.
it is found that the aircraft is registered in another country.
the C of A is invalid.
the Noise certificate is invalid. Correct Answer is. it is found that the aircraft is registered in another country. Explanation. VAR Part 2.017(a)(3).

question: The copy of the ferry flight permit shall be:

options.text: sent to AMO.
kept on the airplane during its ferry flight.
sent to CAAV.
sent to the aircraft manufacture. Correct Answer is. kept on the airplane during its ferry flight. Explanation. VAR part 20, 20.070(c).

question: A Certificate of Maintenance Review is.

options.text: is required for all aircraft over 2.730kg.
is not required for transport aircraft.
required for all aircraft with its registration of Vietnamese nationality.
is required for aircraft which exceed an MTOW of 5700 kg and carry more than 19 passengers. Explanation. VAR Part 20, 20.103 (a).

question: When does a Noise Certification become valid?

options.text: As the same time the airworthiness certificate validity.
After the Certificate of Approval issued.
Once the Certificate of Registration has been issued.
Before the airworthiness certificate is issued. Correct Answer is. As the same time the airworthiness certificate validity. Explanation. VAR Part 4, 4.033.

question: AOC is.

options.text: Air Operator Certificate
Approved Operator Certificate
Aircraft Operator Certificate
Approval Operator Certificate Correct Answer is. Air Operator Certificate Explanation. VAR Part 12, 12.005

question: MEL is.

options.text: Minimum Equipment List.
Maintenance equipment list.
published by the manufacture.
Management equipment list Correct Answer is. Minimum Equipment List. Explanation. VAR Part 12, 12.005.

question: The MEL is built by.

options.text: The Air Operator.
The manufacture.
Approved Maintenance Organization.
Approved Training Organization. Correct Answer is. The Operator. Explanation. VAR Part 12, 12.170

question: The MEL developed by Vietnam AOC holder is approved by.

options.text: CAAV.
The Air Operator.
The manufacture.
Approved Training Organization. Correct Answer is. CAAV. Explanation. VAR Part 12, 12.170

question: An approved certificate of conformity certifies that.

options.text: items are serviceable on delivery.
materials and parts come from an approved source.
materials and parts conform to required standard.

materials and parts are in good conditions. Correct Answer is. materials and parts conform to required standard. Explanation. An approved certificate certifies that materials or parts conform to a required standard.

question: The Certificate of airworthiness issued by CAAV and valid:

options.text: not exceeding 9 months from its issuing date.
not exceeding 12 months from its issuing date.
not exceeding 18 months from its issuing date.
not exceeding 24 months from its issuing date. Correct Answer is. not exceeding 12 months from its issuing date. Explanation. VAR Part 20, 20.055

question: To issue and extend of noise certificate, an aircraft operator must meet the following requirements?

options.text: Accordance with the certificate of CAAV-approved or recognized for that type of aircraft.
In good condition to ensure safe operations.
Accordance with the certificate of CAAV-approved or recognized for that type of aircraft and in good condition to ensure safe operations.

All defects related to engine must be controlled and cleared to reduce noise in operation Correct Answer is. Accordance with the certificate of CAAV-approved or recognized for that type of aircraft and in good condition to ensure safe operations. Explanation. VAR Part 4, 4.033.

question: The Certificate of airworthiness of the aircraft registration as the Vietnamese nationality/ registration as the foreign nationality but the operation shall follow the Air Operator Certificate issued by CAAV is:

options.text: Issued by CAAV.
Issued by the aviation authority of State of registry of aircraft.
Issued by CAAV or issued by the aviation authority of state of registry of aircraft which may be recognized by the CAAV.
Aircraft Design Correct Answer is. Issued by CAAV or issued by the aviation authority of state of registry of aircraft which may be recognized by the CAAV Explanation. VAR Part 20, 20.020.

question: Aircraft Maintenance Schedules are issued.

options.text: in a folder with the operator’s name on the cover.
with an approval certificate by the CAAV.
by the operator with CAAV approval.
by CAAV Correct Answer is. by the operator with CAAV approval. Explanation. VAR Part 4, 4.063.

question: Which of the following must be recorded in a Logbook (an aircraft logbook, an engine log book) after a component has been replaced?

options.text: Serial number, name of manufacturer and number of the licensed engineer carrying out the replacement.

Part number of component. Type of aircraft and Registration number, MSN of aircraft that the component is installed on aircraft and time of removal - installation of component. Total operating hours and cycles or total time of remaining life limit of the component.
Serial number, part number, reason for removal.

VAR Part number and reason for removal. Correct Answer is. VAR Part number of component. Type, Registration, MSN of aircraft that the component is installed on aircraft and time of removal - installation of component. Total FH, FC or total time of remaining LLP Explanation. VAR Part 20, 20.095 (4).

question: Who is responsible for establishing and controlling system to records aircraft technical logbook?

options.text: AMO
CAAV
Aircraft operator
as required by manufacture Correct Answer is. Aircraft operator. Explanation. VAR Part 20, 20.097.

question: Who can sign an Aircraft Certificate of Maintenance Review?

options.text: The captain of the aircraft if he holds an A.T.P.L.
A Flight Engineer licensed for the aircraft type.
QA staff of AMO
The aircraft maintenance review staff is authorised by the CAAV. Correct Answer is. The aircraft maintenance review staff is authorised by the CAAV Explanation. VAR Part 20, 20.105.

question: If the Vietnam AOC holder wants to change the content of the aircraft maintenance schedule, what action must be taken?

options.text: Amend the Aircraft Maintenance Schedule.
Await CAAV approval before amending the Aircraft Maintenance Schedule.
Issue temporary Aircraft Maintenance Schedule without CAAV approval.
Amend the Aircraft Maintenance Schedule and seek the CAAV approval. Correct Answer is. Amend the Aircraft Maintenance Schedule and seek the CAAV approval. Explanation. VAR Part 4, 4.063(d).

question: The controlling of a Technical Log is mandatory.

options.text: for all aircraft registered in the Vietnam having a Certificate of Airworthiness
for all aircraft registered in the Vietnam.
for all aircraft flight to Vietnam.
only applicable for aircraft with MTW less than 2730 kg Correct Answer is. for all aircraft registered in the Vietnam having a Certificate of Airworthiness. Explanation. VAR Part 20, 20.097.

question: If an engine is inhibited. Where is this recorded?

options.text: Airframe Logbook.
Engine Logbook.
Flight Manual.
as describe by Engine manual. Correct Answer is. Engine Logbook. Explanation. VAR Part 20, 20.095, Appendix 2 Engine Logbook (CAAV/FSSD-AIR-031).

question: A modification carried out to an engine iaw manufacturer’s construction that is approved by CAAV will be recorded in:

options.text: The Engine Logbook.
The Aircraft Logbook.
The modification record book.
Techlog book Correct Answer is. The Engine Logbook. Explanation. VAR Part 20, 20.095

question: Deviation in the operation maintenance of the aircraft is approved by CAAV:

options.text: Concession, Dispensation, Exemption
Dispensation, Concession, Variation
Concession, Variation
Concession, Variation, Exemption Correct Answer is. Concession, Variation, Exemption Explanation. VAR Part 20, 20.095

question: Which CAAV’s form is used to request the issuance deviations related to aircraft operation that exceed the limits specified in the document MEL / CDL, as well as the limits were made in the maintenance data (AMM, IPC, SRM ...)?

options.text: Exemption (CAAV/FSSD-AIR 044)
Variation (CAAV/FSSD-AIR 042)
Concession Request (CAAV/FSSD-AIR 040)
Form 523 Correct Answer is. Concession Request (CAAV/FSSD-AIR 040) Explanation. Appendix 2 To VAR Part 20, 20.117(a)

question: Which CAAV’s form is used to request the issuance deviations related to extend the maintenance limit of aircraft / aircraft equipment as specified in the Aircraft Maintenance Schedule (AMS)?

options.text: Exemption (CAAV/FSSD-AIR 044)
Variation Request (CAAV/FSSD-AIR 042)
Concession (CAAV/FSSD-AIR 040)
Form 523 Correct Answer is. Variation Request (CAAV/FSSD-AIR 042) Explanation. Appendix 2 to VAR Part 20, 20.117(b)

question: Which CAAV’s form is used to request the issuance deviations related to the discrepancy in the procedures set forth in the Maintenance Organization Exposition (MOE)?

options.text: Exemption (CAAV/FSSD-AIR 044)
Variation (CAAV/FSSD-AIR 042)
Concession (CAAV/FSSD-AIR 040)
Form 523 Correct Answer is. Exemption (CAAV/FSSD-AIR 044) Explanation. Appendix 2 to VAR Part 20, 20.117(c)

question: The Certificate of Maintenance Review (CMR) is required by.

options.text: all aircraft on the Vietnam register.
all aircraft operated under VAR Part.
all Vietnam register aircraft with MTW less than 2730 kg

all aircraft on the Vietnam register, all aircraft operated under VAR Part, all Vietnam register aircraft with MTW less than 2730 kg. Correct Answer is. all aircraft on the Vietnam register, all aircraft operated under VAR Part, all Vietnam register aircraft with MTW less than 2730 kg. Explanation. VAR Part 20, 20.103

question: The aircraft is capable of safe flight but unable to meet applicable airworthiness requirements such as: flying to base where maintenance is to be performed or storage. Is this aircraft issued certificate of airworthiness?

options.text: no, aircraft must meet all airworthiness requirements.
yes, if manufacture issued NTO (Non-Technical Objection)
no, aircraft is on-ground for rectifying to meet all airworthiness requirements

CAAV may issue a Special Airworthiness Certificate (Special Flight Permits) for this aircraft. Correct Answer is. CAAV may issue a Special Airworthiness Certificate (Special Flight Permits) for this aircraft Explanation. VAR Part 4, 4.035: CAAV may issue Special Airworthiness Certificate to an aircraft. Aircraft holding Special Airworthiness Certificates shall be subject to operating limitations within Vietnam and may not make international flights.

question: When shall the aircraft certificate of maintenance review be made for aircraft with MTW over 2730kg?

options.text: Duration of 4 months
Duration of 6 months
Duration of 12 months
Duration of 18 months Correct Answer is. Duration 6 months Explanation. VAR Part 20, 20.103.
